title: Anthropic Files For An IPO: Rapid Reaction — With M.G. Siegler
summary: Anthropic has filed for an IPO, and analysts discuss the significance of the company going public before OpenAI, assess Claude's current capabilities, and question whether Anthropic actually needs additional capital at this stage.
